title: Hot Day in the VRG
summary:
We stopped for one day in the Virgin River Gorge Recreation Area. While the setting was very pretty, the temperatures were very high. For some reason, I chose to do a long run in the middle of the day, which was not very pleasant (especially after I ran out of water with 4 miles to go). The afternoon was spent escaping the heat by sitting in the shade of our van. We did some reading, Helen did some watercolor painting and I wrote a rare entry in my journal. We had a lovely hike down to the Virgin River as the sunset, which was a nice way to end the day.

-Colin

A selfie during our sunset hike.
